name: Analysis of integrated clinical safety data of tadalafil in patients receiving concomitant antihypertensive medications.
summary: Pooled safety analysis of 72 phase II-IV studies in ED and/or BPH patients evaluating hypotension-related treatment-emergent adverse events and major adverse cardiovascular events by antihypertensive medication use.

access_attempts.notes: PMC full-text URL available but extraction used the PubMed abstract for first baseline.
